body.title: CC Nightly: feedback extraction from transcripts
body.result: cc_nightly_learning.py: parses JSONL transcripts, 14-pattern detector, 9 signals from today's session, idempotent, writes memory/*.md files
body.description:
Extract feedback signals from session transcripts and update memory tree.

**Affected files:** lab/claudecode/cc_nightly_learning.py (new), memory/*.md (updated by script)
**Design rules:** autonomous-learning, memory-update-safety, transcript-processing
**Scope boundary:**
  IN: Load transcript, find feedback signals (explicit: 'good work', implicit: approved design), extract context, update feedback tree
  OUT: Decision classification, metrics collection, pattern generalization
**Completion criteria:**
  1. Load daily transcript (from session log or Claude Code history)
  2. Find explicit feedback: 'good work', 'stop doing X', 'CC++', corrective comments
  3. Find implicit feedback: user approved design → tag as validated pattern
  4. Extract context for each feedback item
  5. Append to memory/feedback_*.md files
  6. Test: run on today's transcript, verify 8+ feedback items extracted, all formatted correctly
